violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Per PIC, rice and sauce was made at home. Rice and sauce was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is to only receive/buy food from an approved source. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Sauce was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Prep unit #1 was observed in poor repair with plastic wrap covering the top of unit. Prep unit lid must be fixed/replaced. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The condensate from the ice machine unit is draining into the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
Coffee pot was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and rolling cart have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
